headline: Investors Should Buy These 6 Stocks To Take Advantage Of The AI Revolution, Says Defiance ETFs CEO
summary: Artificial intelligence has revolutionized many industries in recent years, and it's an emerging technology that investors should be paying attention to while trading in the stock market.

headline: Amazon Overhauls Delivery Network, Focuses On Faster Delivery And Profits
summary: Amazon.com, Inc (NASDAQ: AMZN) has overhauled its logistics and delivery mechanism to send products to customers more quickly.

headline: Yonhap Reported Earlier: Samsung Electronics Executive Chairman Lee Jae-Yong Met With Tesla CEO Elon Musk At Samsung's Silicon Valley Semiconductor Research Center On Wednesday

summary: Investors who placed their hard-earned cash into major U.S. indices have enjoyed respectable returns over the past 5 years.
